# Phase 8 Source Inventory

The following old-Jake material is preserved as Phase 8 source material and was intentionally not migrated into runtime or generic reference paths during Phase 7:

- old Jake `docs/jake/`
- old Jake `training/data/`
- old Jake `training/exports/`
- old Jake `training/source_intake/`

Intended use:

- extract prompt/response pairs
- extract eval and checklist cases
- convert useful operator-language examples into stable fixture files

Rules:

- do not import these materials at runtime
- do not treat them as deterministic truth
- use them only to build explicit Phase 8 understanding-layer fixtures and evaluation cases
